languages.text: "Дай подумать... Определенно, слова {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножреца{/g} для него — не пустой звук. Экзальт-117 стал бы ценным союзником для нас. Еще, как ни странно, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцы{/g}: отец ценит своих бойцов и зачастую беседует с их командованием лично. Ну и, разумеется, Лария". {n}Наследница ядовито кривится, будто ей противно само имя сестры.{/n} "Но ее собачью преданность отцу вряд ли получится поколебать".

traits.locale_text: "Дай подумать... Определенно, слова {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножреца{/g} для него — не пустой звук. Экзальт-117 стал бы ценным союзником для нас. Еще, как ни странно, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцы{/g}: отец ценит своих бойцов и зачастую беседует с их командованием лично. Ну и, разумеется, Лария". {n}Наследница ядовито кривится, будто ей противно само имя сестры.{/n} "Но ее собачью преданность отцу вряд ли получится поколебать".

languages.text: "Let me think... The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."

Еще, как ни странно, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцы{/g}: отец ценит своих бойцов и зачастую беседует с их командованием лично. Ну и, разумеется, Лария". {n}Наследница ядовито кривится, будто ей противно само имя сестры.{/n} "Но ее собачью преданность отцу вряд ли получится поколебать".

And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."

"Let me think... The Tech-Priest's words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the Merovians are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."

"Let me think... The Tech-Priest's words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the Merovians are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."

languages.text: «Deje que piense... Las palabras del {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} son más que un desperdicio de aire para Seberian, eso es seguro. Exaltado-117 sería un aliado muy valioso. Los {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}merovianos{/g} son otra posibilidad: por extraño que parezca, mi padre tiene en alta estima a sus guerreros y habla personalmente con sus comandantes. Y, por supuesto, también está Laria». {n}Juvenna se encoge, como si el mero nombre de su hermana le repugnara.{/n} «Pero será difícil doblegar su fe ciega en mi padre».
languages.original_text: "Let me think... The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."

traits.locale_text: «Deje que piense... Las palabras del {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} son más que un desperdicio de aire para Seberian, eso es seguro. Exaltado-117 sería un aliado muy valioso. Los {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}merovianos{/g} son otra posibilidad: por extraño que parezca, mi padre tiene en alta estima a sus guerreros y habla personalmente con sus comandantes. Y, por supuesto, también está Laria». {n}Juvenna se encoge, como si el mero nombre de su hermana le repugnara.{/n} «Pero será difícil doblegar su fe ciega en mi padre».

languages.text: “让我想想……那个{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}的话，塞贝里安肯定不会只是当耳旁风。尊使-117会是个有价值的盟友。{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫人{/g}也算是备选。说来奇怪，我父亲很看重他手下的战士，经常亲自和他们的指挥官交谈。当然，还有菈丽雅。”{n}尤文娜皱了皱眉，仿佛提起这个名字就让她恶心。{/n}“但她对我父亲那死心塌地的忠诚，怕是动摇不了。”
languages.original_text: "Let me think... The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."

traits.locale_text: “让我想想……那个{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}的话，塞贝里安肯定不会只是当耳旁风。尊使-117会是个有价值的盟友。{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫人{/g}也算是备选。说来奇怪，我父亲很看重他手下的战士，经常亲自和他们的指挥官交谈。当然，还有菈丽雅。”{n}尤文娜皱了皱眉，仿佛提起这个名字就让她恶心。{/n}“但她对我父亲那死心塌地的忠诚，怕是动摇不了。”

languages.text: « Laissez-moi réfléchir... Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} jouit d'une influence considérable sur mon père. Oui, Exalt-117 ferait un précieux allié. Sans oublier les {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Meroviens{/g} : aussi étrange que cela puisse paraître, Seberian tient ses soldats en haute estime et il s'entretient régulièrement avec leurs commandants. Et bien sûr, il y a aussi Laria. » {n}Juvenna esquisse une grimace, comme si le seul nom de sa sœur la dégoûtait au plus haut point.{/n} « Mais je doute que nous parvenions à ébranler la dévotion aveugle que lui inspire notre figure paternelle. »
languages.original_text: "Let me think... The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."

traits.locale_text: « Laissez-moi réfléchir... Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} jouit d'une influence considérable sur mon père. Oui, Exalt-117 ferait un précieux allié. Sans oublier les {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Meroviens{/g} : aussi étrange que cela puisse paraître, Seberian tient ses soldats en haute estime et il s'entretient régulièrement avec leurs commandants. Et bien sûr, il y a aussi Laria. » {n}Juvenna esquisse une grimace, comme si le seul nom de sa sœur la dégoûtait au plus haut point.{/n} « Mais je doute que nous parvenions à ébranler la dévotion aveugle que lui inspire notre figure paternelle. »

languages.text: "Bir düşüneyim... {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip'in{/g} sözleri, Seberian için kesinlikle boşa harcanmış nefes değildir. Yüce-117 bizim için değerli bir müttefik olabilir. {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovlular{/g} da bir başka olasılık: Ne kadar tuhaf olsa da babam, savaşçılarına değer veriyor ve sık sık komutanlarıyla bizzat konuşuyor. Bir de tabii ki Laria var." {n}Juvenna, kız kardeşinin adı bile onu iğrendiriyormuş gibi yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n} "Ancak babama olan inatçı bağlılığının sarsılması pek olası değil."
languages.original_text: "Let me think... The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."

traits.locale_text: "Bir düşüneyim... {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip'in{/g} sözleri, Seberian için kesinlikle boşa harcanmış nefes değildir. Yüce-117 bizim için değerli bir müttefik olabilir. {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovlular{/g} da bir başka olasılık: Ne kadar tuhaf olsa da babam, savaşçılarına değer veriyor ve sık sık komutanlarıyla bizzat konuşuyor. Bir de tabii ki Laria var." {n}Juvenna, kız kardeşinin adı bile onu iğrendiriyormuş gibi yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n} "Ancak babama olan inatçı bağlılığının sarsılması pek olası değil."

languages.text: "Lasst mich nachdenken ... Die Worte des {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriesters{/g} sind für Seberian definitiv mehr als leere Luft. Exalt-117 wäre ein wertvoller Verbündeter für uns. Die {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovianer{/g} sind eine weitere Möglichkeit: So seltsam es auch ist, mein Vater schätzt seine Kämpfer und unterhält sich oft persönlich mit ihren Kommandeuren. Und dann wäre da natürlich noch Laria." {n}Juvenna zuckt zusammen, als würde sie allein der Name ihrer Schwester anwidern.{/n} "Aber ihre hündische Hingabe für meinen Vater ist wohl nicht zu erschüttern."
languages.original_text: "Let me think... The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."

traits.locale_text: "Lasst mich nachdenken ... Die Worte des {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g}s sind für Seberian definitiv mehr als leere Luft. Exalt-117 wäre ein wertvoller Verbündeter für uns. Die {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovianer{/g} sind eine weitere Möglichkeit: So seltsam es auch ist, mein Vater schätzt seine Kämpfer und unterhält sich oft persönlich mit ihren Kommandeuren. Und dann wäre da natürlich noch Laria." {n}Juvenna zuckt zusammen, als würde sie allein der Name ihrer Schwester anwidern.{/n} "Aber ihre hündische Hingabe für meinen Vater ist wohl nicht zu erschüttern."

languages.text: 「考えてみれば…シベリアにとって、{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}テクプリストの{/g}言葉は単なる無駄な空言ではない。エクサルト117は我々にとって貴重な同盟者となるだろう。そして、もう1つの可能性は{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}メロヴィアン{/g}だ。奇妙に思えるかもしれないが、父は自分の兵士を大切にしている。そして、彼らの指揮官と直接会話をしている。そしてもちろん、ラリアがいる。」{n}ユベナは妹の名前を聞くだけで、顔をしかめた。{/n}「しかし、父への彼女の執着は揺るがないだろう」
languages.original_text: "Let me think... The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."
